{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Cradle salute
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Cradle salute]] consists of fists pressed together.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
